findings.title: Authenticated user grants self gold/premium via POST /api/organizations with no payment
findings.summary: Endpoint accepts plan in {'gold','premium'} and 1-500 seats, then writes users.planType=plan AND sets custom claim planType=plan. No subscription/payment cross-check, no admin gate.
findings.exploit: curl -X POST /api/organizations -H 'authorization: Bearer <free user token>' -d '{"name":"x","type":"school","plan":"premium","totalSeats":500}' → 200; refresh ID token; user is now premium across the app.
findings.money_impact: Full bypass of monetization on the highest-margin tier (₹4799/yr premium per user × seat count).

findings.title: Billing reconciliation queries non-existent users.plan field; silently disables the entire safety net
findings.summary: Webhook writes users.planType; reconciler reads users.plan and writes users.plan. Net: rzp_active_fs_free fires on every paid user (false positives), auto-fix writes a new orphan 'plan' field that nothing reads, terminal-state auto-downgrade never reflects in JWT claim or middleware view of plan.
findings.exploit: If a webhook is lost (Firestore outage, Cloud Run cold-start dropped POST), the user paid but stays on free. Reconciliation, the documented safety net, will not detect or fix this in production.
findings.money_impact: Paid customers blocked from features they paid for; manual ops required for every missed webhook.

findings.title: Webhook resolves planType via substring match on user-controlled notes.planKey
findings.summary: subscription.notes.planKey.includes('premium') / .includes('gold'). Notes are echoed verbatim from create-subscription payload.
findings.exploit: Once gold/premium plan IDs exist in RAZORPAY_PLANS, attacker calls create-subscription with planKey: 'pro_monthly_premium', pays pro pricing, webhook upgrades them to premium.
findings.money_impact: Tier-overshoot fraud once multi-tier plans ship.

findings.title: Idempotency event-id derives from payload; missing payment.id+subscription.id falls back to Date.now()
findings.summary: Edge-case events (some lifecycle events without payment entity) may dedup correctly today, but the Date.now() fallback is non-deterministic. Use Razorpay envelope event id.

findings.title: Public checkout creates Firebase users for unverified emails before any payment
findings.summary: Anonymous attacker enumerates real email addresses; Firebase user is created with emailVerified=false; victim later hits auth/email-already-in-use or gets linked to squat account.
findings.fix: Defer Firebase user creation to the webhook; only persist {email, planKey} in subscription notes.

findings.title: Reconciliation auto-downgrade writes wrong field (same root cause as F7-002)
findings.summary: After Razorpay subscription expires, reconciler tries to set users.plan='free' but the live field is users.planType. JWT claim is also not touched.

findings.title: subscription.cancelled webhook downgrades immediately, ignoring current_end
findings.summary: If Razorpay fires cancelled before current_end (e.g. immediate-cancel via dashboard, or admin action), paid user loses the rest of the cycle. Cancel-at-end-of-cycle UX in /api/billing/cancel is implicitly violated whenever Razorpay sends the cancelled event early.

findings.title: CLAIM_SET_FAILED retry re-runs full upgrade branch including magic-link mint, overwriting any previously generated link
findings.summary: Firestore plan is upgraded BEFORE custom-claim set. On claim failure, event marked failed; retry path re-runs the entire branch and regenerates the magic sign-in link, invalidating the previous one stored in pendingSignInLinks.

verified_correct: Bad-signature returns 401 (not 5xx) preventing Razorpay retry storms — yesterday's fix 9309c25fe present in tree
Plan + subscription update inside runTransaction — atomic (src/app/api/webhooks/razorpay/route.ts:93-106)
Provisions access on subscription.charged ONLY (not subscription.activated) — handles UPI mandate registration correctly
Reconciliation CRON_SECRET gate returns 401 on bad bearer, 503 if secret unconfigured (src/app/api/jobs/billing-reconciliation/route.ts:25-33)
Reconciliation never auto-refunds; double-charge always flagged for manual review (src/lib/billing-reconciliation.ts:397-410)
